title: ochlandra travancorica
intro: Ochlandra travancorica, also known as Travancore cane, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Poaceae, commonly found in the Western Ghats region of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ochlandra travancorica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and burns. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by decocting its leaves and roots in water, and it is also used in the form of powder or oil to treat various health conditions.
